examples: It was just a piece of harmless frivolity.
There is just not enough fun and frivolity in culture today.
There is a serious message at the core of all this frivolity.
Valencia-based Spanish designer Jaime Hayon tempers frivolity and luxury with adaptability in his Baccarat Zoo series.
But what, I ask you, does this lighthearted season of frivolity mean for the serious music lover?
